meaning: n.鍙や唬甯岃厞鐨勯噸瑁呭姝ュ叺
examples: The hoplite has two weapons, of which the most important by far is a pike, I guess, is what we would call it.
From then on battles were won not by individual champions but through the weight of massed hoplite phalanxes breaking through enemy ranks.
John wants me to speak to his research teammates at Hoplite, including a 1998 lacrosse captain, a 2006 hockey player, and an all-Ivy 2001 running back, on my next trip to the States.
Additionally, Och-Ziff and Hoplite Capital established new positions.
